Build information

dev
A A

A focused Catalan verb trainer built for daily practice.

  • 500 verbs with full conjugation tables
  • Core Catalan tenses — present, passat simple, imperfet, futur, condicional, subjuntiu
  • Smart frequency weighting & learning presets
  • Voice dictation with instant feedback 🎤
  • Text-to-speech pronunciation 🔊
  • Full conjugation tables for every verb 📖
  • Offline support (PWA)

Progress and settings save automatically.

Catalan Verb Patterns & Tips

-AR Verbs (Present)

Endings: o, es, a, em, eu, en

Rhyme: "jo -o, tu -es, ell -a... nosaltres -em, vosaltres -eu, ells -en"

Example: parlar → jo parlo, tu parles, ell parla, nosaltres parlem, vosaltres parleu, ells parlen

-RE / -ER Verbs (Present)

Endings: c, s, —, em, eu, en

Note: jo ends in -c (or silent); ell/ella has no ending added.

Example: córrer → jo corro, tu corres, ell corre, nosaltres correm, vosaltres correu, ells corren

-IR Verbs (Present)

Two patterns: pure (-ir) and inchoative (-eix- infix).

Pure: dormir → jo dormo, tu dorms, ell dorm, nosaltres dormim, vosaltres dormiu, ells dormen

Inchoative: servir → jo serveixo, tu serveixes, ell serveix, nosaltres servim, vosaltres serviu, ells serveixen

Key Irregular Verbs

ser: jo sóc, tu ets, ell és, nosaltres som, vosaltres sou, ells són

estar: jo estic, tu estàs, ell està, nosaltres estem, vosaltres esteu, ells estan

tenir: jo tinc, tu tens, ell té, nosaltres tenim, vosaltres teniu, ells tenen

anar: jo vaig, tu vas, ell va, nosaltres anem, vosaltres aneu, ells van

Tip: ser = permanent identity; estar = temporary state/location.
